get.summary:
Retrieves a list of clients with information about their pickup(VL || HL) shipments/legs and wether they have been communicated or not.
Only for the first client the distinct pickup tour points are retrieved and attached to the response.

parameters.description: Start date from which clients list info will be retrieved.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: End date until which clients list info will be retrieved.

parameters.name: Database-Identifier
parameters.description: Identifier for the database to be used

Retrieves the tourpoints for a given client.
Tourpoints contain information along with other such as wether they have been communicated or not.

parameters.description: The client name to retrieve tourpoints information for

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Start date from which tourpoint informations will be retrieved.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: End date until which tourpoint informations will be retrieved.
